response.justification: Bogdan has extensive fullstack experience with TypeScript, React, Node.js, and databases, plus strong architecture and DevOps exposure, but his resume overstates seniority (Staff/Senior roles since 2014), lacks clear evidence of REST/PostgreSQL/Nest.js in recent work, and shows minimal alignment with renewable energy/construction tech or AWS/Kubernetes as required; his German language deficiency and high on-site requirement also raise red flags.
strengths: Strong TypeScript and fullstack experience across multiple frameworks
Proven DevOps and infrastructure skills (Docker, CI/CD, GitLab)
Demonstrated ability to lead open-source projects and technical workshops
concerns: Exaggerated seniority labels misalign with junior/mid-level role expectations
No clear evidence of PostgreSQL, Nest.js, or REST API design in recent roles
Basic German proficiency conflicts with high on-site requirement in Germany
